title: Safety Procedures (PD)
description: Fire alarms, first aid, dangerous occurrences, and firefighting procedures.

questions.prompt: List the steps to be taken if the fire alarm sounds whilst you are using a machine.
Explain why it is important to use appropriate fire escape routes and report to your assembly point.
Describe the first aid facilities within your specified engineering area.
State at least three dangerous occurrences or malfunctions which should be reported.
Summarise what action should be taken on discovering a fire.
Summarise the policy regarding fire extinguishers and fire blankets.
What are the most common causes of fire in a workshop environment?
What can you do to prevent fire from occurring?
